title: eupatorium quaternum
intro: Eupatorium quaternum, also known as Eupatorium, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, making it a potential remedy for pain relief and fever reduction. The health benefits of Eupatorium quaternum include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate headaches, and support the immune system. Eupatorium quaternum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, making it accessible for herbal use, although its safety and efficacy may vary depending on the preparation and individual needs.
